title: Lunchbox Pack
description: Four friendly kids line up with empty lunch boxes — pack each one what they ask for! Listen to spoken requests, build a balanced meal from the five food groups, and count foods into the box.
learningGoals: Sort foods into groups: fruit, veggie, main, drink, treat
Count 1–5 while packing, with one-to-one correspondence
Practical independence: what goes in a balanced lunch
interactionModel: drag foods from the shelf into the lunch box (tap-tap fallback: tap a food, tap the box)
feedbackModel: Warm recorded voice praise + pop/sparkle SFX on success; a wrong food wiggles and glides back with a gentle 'try again' — nothing is ever lost or punished. Lid close, confetti, and a star per packed box.
credits: Kaigani; art + voice generated locally (see ASSETS.md). Built with Claude Code for QLOBE Kids.
